children.value:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

x = np.linspace(0, 1, 50)
y1 = 2*x
y2 = x/2

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=[4, 2])
ax.plot(x, y1, label=r"$y = 2x$")
ax.plot(x, y2, label=r"$y = x/2$")
ax.legend()
fig.show()
